metadata.og:title: MarketMinds - Marqo
metadata.og:description: A sleek, conversion-focused Framer template built for SaaS, agencies, and marketing teams. Showcase products, services, and case studies with bold visuals, clean typography, and fluid animations.

json.company_description: MarketMinds, a digital marketing agency, needed to improve campaign efficiency and client reporting. They integrated AI-powered analytics and reporting tools to automate data collection, identify trends, and generate real-time insights.
